name: Sales Operations Manager for Shopify Plus stores processing 10-20 sales commissions/month tool
description: For Sales Operations Managers for Shopify Plus stores processing 10-20 sales commissions/month, inaccurate calculations cause delayed payouts. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation.
target_audience: Sales Operations Manager for Shopify Plus stores processing 10-20 sales commissions/month
problem_solved: Inaccurate sales commission calculations leading to discrepancies in payouts.
features: Monthly summary reports of sales commissions
Manual entry option for commission adjustments
Basic dashboard for tracking commission discrepancies
